findings.title: No trace/correlation IDs through the IdentityBridgeConsumer
findings.description: IdentityBridgeConsumer logs brand/event/brain_id/partition/offset but no structured trace_id or correlation_id field. End-to-end tracing across Kafka -> bridge -> Postgres requires manual log correlation. Not a test coverage gap (no test exercises the bridge directly), but an observability gap.

findings.title: Salt hard-fail NOT tested at IdentityBridgeConsumer level (only at SaltProvider unit level)
findings.description: The 4 SaltProvider hard-crash guard tests verify that SaltProvider throws. No test verifies that when ResolveIdentityUseCase.execute throws due to salt failure, the IdentityBridgeConsumer does NOT commit the Kafka offset. The architecture intention is correct (let it propagate), and the code path is correct, but the offset-non-commit behavior on salt failure has no direct test.

findings.title: dist/index.js in identity-core is stale (still contains stubSha256)
findings.description: packages/identity-core/dist/index.js still contains stubSha256. This is NOT used at runtime (package.json main=src/index.ts) and not used by tests. However the stale build artifact is misleading and a CI build step should clean it.

findings.title: phone-guard-reeval Argo job silently processes 0 brands (SR-01 from Security - confirmed carry-forward)
findings.description: Confirmed by Security (SR-01). The re-eval job cannot enumerate brands due to RLS without a GUC. D-1 windowing re-evaluation is non-functional. Safe direction (fail-closed), but un-suppress is broken.
findings.defer: P1 post-M1 (brand enumeration via superuser pool or system API)

negative_control.protection_removed: SET ROLE brain_app + BRAND_B GUC → query for BRAND_A identity_link rows
negative_control.command: docker exec brainv3-postgres-1 psql -U brain -d brain -c 'BEGIN; SET ROLE brain_app; SELECT set_config(brand_b_guc); SELECT COUNT(*) FROM identity_link WHERE brand_id=BRAND_A; ROLLBACK;'
negative_control.captured_red_output: cross_brand_isolation_must_be_zero = 0 (superuser sees 1 row; brain_app sees 0 rows — RLS fires)

negative_control.protection_removed: SET ROLE brain_app + brand_id GUC without app.role=send_service → query contact_pii
negative_control.command: docker exec brainv3-postgres-1 psql -U brain -d brain -c 'BEGIN; SET ROLE brain_app; set_config(brand_a_guc); NO app.role; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contact_pii; ROLLBACK;'
negative_control.captured_red_output: without_send_service_role = 0 (WITH send_service = 1; WITHOUT send_service = 0 — D-3 policy fires)

migration_verified.contact_pii_dual_guc_policy: brand_id = current_setting('app.current_brand_id', TRUE)::uuid AND current_setting('app.role', TRUE) = 'send_service'
